titleStmt.title: SII 35.17: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 17. (A.R. No. 78 of 1951-52.) BĀḶAMBĪḌ, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone (No. V) set up near the Vishaharēśvara temple.
This inscription referring itself to the reign of Āhavamalladēva is dated Śaka 979 (in words), Viḷambi, Vaiśākha śu. 3, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1058, March 29, Sunday, f.d.t. 03.

It describes the Banavāsi country, its illustrious town Mahātaṭāka-grāma and its highly learned Mahājanas. It also records the gift of the tank area (called kṛishṇa-taṭāka) with the whole quantity of water in it, after purchase from and with the consent of the Mahājanas for the exclusive benefit of the deity Aṇḍurēśvara by several persons (whose names are specified). Bhaṭṭa Vishṇu composed the record. Kāśyapa-Mādhva wrote it handsomely on stone and rūvāri Nāki engraved it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmadāṁgīrasagōtrada
ka makradiṁtara putra
ṣōttamayyaṁ dēvara garbbhagrahamaṁ māḍisidarū
© svasti Āsīdaśēṣanarapatimakuṭamaṇimayūkhamaṁjarīraṁjitapādapīṭhapratāpadava da hanajvāḷāva
ḷisamālīḍhānamrapārtthivassakaḷadigvijayōpārjjitavīralakṣmīsamāliṁgitaviśāḷavakṣa sthaḷōdānavārisa sakta
vibudha madhukaranikarōjaḷadhiriva ratnākarō nārāyaṇaiva lakṣmīnivāsaśśaśāṁkaiva kaḷādharaṁ prabhākara Ivōstrapratāpa
ścaturānanaiva prajānādassinānirivāmighaśaktidharōbhūtanāthaivabhūdhara śikharādivāsōṁgaja Ivāṁganājana manaḥ
kṣabhajananaparājita Ivārtthapatiḥ kalpapādapa Iva prātyatārtthaprada kīrttisudhādhavaḷita brahnāṇḍakuharēśvara cō
ḷa koṁkaṇa gurjjara māḷava kaurava paṁcāla gauḍa kaḷiṁgāṁga vaṁgamahipati saṁpāditākṣaya kōśaḥ kōśala
Animajjitāśēṣavīramahēśaṁ Īśacaraṇāraviṁdamadhukaraḥ karasaṁvardhitanikhiḷabhuvagōva nāri kētuṁ vāmā
ṣaśarāsanakāryaṁ kāryakāryavivēka cāturyavācasvatirvācasvatisadṛśa vividhavibudha bōdhōddhyāyamā
namānasāndhakāraḥ śrīmāñjayasiṁhadēvaścāḷukyābharaṇaḥ . © tasyātmaja śśatruviḷāsinīnāṁ vaidhavya dīkṣāgururāhavō
kkaḥsaśāntirāmahavamalladēvōniṣkaṁṭakāmapprativīraśabdaḥ yaśya pratāpadahanānaḷavisphuḷiṁgurnnirmmūḷitāḷatyumahīru
hēṣūṁĀdyapirāḍumavaṇaṁ nahitēkṣamantibhūkaṁṭakōddharaṇayatnaparāyaṇasya . yaṁkoṁ karṇānbaṇḍi
tamānadarppana kādidakṣatasatyavādasatyajitānidita rājacihnanyātāgabṟutā nālvavasuccubhayuṁ .
dhārāpi yēnōddhatavikramēṇasaṁdarśitā pūrvvamahipatināṁ Ādarṣaṇiyābaligoṁka mukhyapracaṇḍasāma
ntapurassarēṇaḥ . laṁkānāthasamānacōḷanṛpatiyassayatiprāvṛtaṁ nāgāṇaṁdaśabhiḥ śatairadi balisannāhi
bhassatsareḥ yaśōrāghavavajjaṣānaniśitu bhūrṇyiranāyāsatōbhūdēvūṣahitāya sannute padaṁ cāḷu
kyarāmōbali śrīmanāhavamallō vidyaśūyānvitūdharāṁ śāntidharmmārtthamāna hētuvu pākṣikavrataśśa
rāyikaḥ . tasminnarapatē mahīṁ śāsativarṇnasaṁkarōtpanna kāyasthebhyinṛtradarlekṣa staskaṁśabdaḥ
svarūpa vācakō vyeyyākaraṇasiddhānta Ivanyartthabhāvātsaṁvṛttaḥ Upasarggēśca dātu prayōgāḍaṁ nṛtya du
rddarśūvigrahaśvasamāsatadditavyābyanādanṛtratatparipālitāyāda rāṁganāyāmukhadita vanavāsidē
śūramaṇiyastattilaka Iva marhātaṭāka grāmā rājatē . yatradvijāśśamadamādi guṇerupētā svādhyayā
yajñajapahōmasamādhiniṣṭhāḥ Adhyāpanādhyayana yājana dānamurcaikṣaṭkarmmabhirnnijagṛhē ṣu sadāramanti
yatratyapaṁḍitajanaviduṣaḥ pṛthivyarādēvi jitṛvijayaṁ nijamātanuti vyabyana ciṁtana vicāraṇa
vādaśikṣavyāpāravarggacaturaḥ pṛthivīpradīpaḥ . yatratyadyetārigrarstanirastapṛdṛccāraṇadōṣa varjjitaṁ
svaravarṇnipadakramasaṁhitāyada Akṣanāmadiyānāḥ nijātkaruṣamapakṣamārṇnassahastaṁ viśatica
tvāriṁśataṁmaśitaṁ śataṁviṁśatyuttaraṁ cavādārna sadasyadiṁyite . yatrakalpasūtra śrāviṇaśpātrādviya parika
lpituṣṭika pāśyaka sūmikavidikāḥ svaparikalpitāhavaniyādṛśayaḥ spūtprekṣītapatniśā Asadūhaviddā
nacātpālaśāmitra marjjūrliyāgnidriyadiṣṇyastāva pradēśāstattakkratu prayāgaṁ sahābhyasuṁrtyiva māḍigu
ṇalaṁkarāyaśēṣagrāma mahājanāya pādapūjā datpā śakanṛpātīta saṁvatsaraṣu navaśētēṣṭi kōnāśityādikēṣu
viḷaṁbisaṁvatsara vaiśākha śuddha tṛtiyāmādityavārē kuḍucaṇnayāṁgīrasagōtra śrīdharōpādhyāyasūnu
prabhu mahādēvayya . Antavvēnadi Āvaṇagrāmasamudbhyatātrēyagōtrā Adudvivēdisūnuṣugpunāyaka . pu
ligeṟegrāma vaśiṣṭagōtra gōvarddhana . nāgadēvasūnu gōpāḷayya . kuṁṭinakeṟeyūraṭṭa hararhaliya
yammana maga kaliyaṇnaseṭṭi . siṁgaṇnaseṭṭi . hiṭṭarceya caṭṭayya nākaseṭṭiya māḷayya . māḷakkana basavase
ṭṭi . Ajjinayyana sōvaya bāguḷiya muddayyana beḷayya . peṟekāṭiya biṭṭiga . Attalūra saṁgavayyana ci
kka bhāyipaseṭṭi . kētaseṭṭiya magaṁ masaṇayya . Aṁgaḍiya sattiyaṇaseṭṭi . Irtyetannā mānassarvvātaśilāśaṁku
kṛṣṇataṭākakṣētra mananyōpayigutattaṭākajalaṁ sarvvaparihārammahājinādāhāya tadanumatyacaṁdra
tāramaṇḍalēśvarāya muktavantaḥ Ētadaiparipālayanti tēṣāndāna samampalaṁ yitvataṁnāśayanti
bhrūṇahatya samādōṣastadācāha . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasundarā ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyājāyatē krimiḥ . Apicadēvaspaṁ brāhmaṇaspaṁcalōbhinupahinastiyaḥ savāhātmāpara lō
kē gṛddōcciṣṭanabēvati . © vādībhapaṁcānana bhaṭṭaviṣṇuśāstrāṁbudhē®pāramitassuvṛttaḥ Aṇḍora ©
śaṁbhū®pada padmabhiṁragaḥ tatṭretra lēkhāvacanaṁvyadatta . tadgrāma janmātilakaḥ kulasyadēvadvicā
gryarccanadatta cittaḥ grāmaprayuktu likhitaṁ vyadatta sadakṣarakāśyapamādhavākhyaḥ .
© mahāgrāma lokkiguṇḍiya nāgavarmmōjaraḷiya rūvāri nākiya likita maṁgaḷa ©
Digital edition of SII 35.17 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
